notes: PlayerClass is the actual RTTI class name (confirmed via ~PlayerClass destructor at 0x14027ED40).
Previously called 'PlayerObject' in the KB -- that was an informal name.
The struct inherits RefCountClass and SignalGeneratorClass (confirmed in destructor).
PlayerArray shortcut at RVA 0xA16FF0 points directly into the array.
PlayerWrapper (Lua binding) stores the PlayerClass pointer at wrapper+0x28.
AIPlayerClass at +0x360 is a separate object, NOT inlined into PlayerClass.

fields.name: vtable_ptr
fields.evidence: Standard vtable pointer. Destructor writes two vtable values during teardown.

fields.name: refcount_data
fields.evidence: RefCountClass base class data. Destructor calls FID_conflict__Tidy_deallocate on offset_0x8.

fields.name: signal_generator_base
fields.evidence: SignalGeneratorClass base class. Destructor calls SignalGeneratorClass::~SignalGeneratorClass.

fields.name: playable
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::Playable = 0x37. Used to determine if player slot is active.

fields.name: padding_38
fields.evidence: Gap between playable flag and DynamicVectorClass region starting at +0x40.

fields.name: slot_index
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::SlotIndex = 0x48. Matches owner_player_id on GameObjectClass+0x58.

fields.name: player_id
fields.evidence: Accessed in AddCredits as *(param_1 + 0x4c), SetTechLevel as *(param_1 + 0x4c), PlayerList_FindByID returns matching player by this ID, Lua_Select_Object reads *(player + 0x4c). Used as the primary player identifier across the engine.

fields.name: team_id
fields.evidence: Getter at 0x140602EE0 reads *(player + 0x54) and returns as double. Context suggests team or secondary ID. The LuaValue<double> getter wraps this int32.

fields.name: ai_player_type_id
fields.evidence: AIPlayerClass constructor stores second param at +0x58 of the AI object. Referenced in Get_Name wrapper (reads *(*(player + 0x360) + 0x58)) to get AI type for name lookup.

fields.name: local_player
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::LocalPlayer = 0x62. Lua getter at 0x140603960 reads *(player + 0x62) as bool. Returns whether this is the local human player.

fields.name: faction_ref
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::FactionName = 0x68. SetTechLevel compares factions via FUN_1403751a0(obj, *(player + 0x68)). Lua_Get_Faction_Name getter at 0x140602A00 reads *(player + 0x68) and extracts string. Change_Owner reads this. Contains FactionClass pointer; faction name string is at *(faction + 0x28) with MSVC SSO at faction+0x40 capacity.

fields.name: credits
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::Credits = 0x70. AddCredits (0x14027F370): reads/writes *(float*)(param_1 + 0x70). Lua_Get_Credits getter at 0x1406027F0 reads *(float*)(player + 0x70). Income multiplier applied for positive adds. Clamped to [0, max_credits].

fields.name: max_credits
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::MaxCredits = 0x74. AddCredits: if *(float*)(param_1 + 0x74) >= 0, credits clamped to this value. If negative, no cap enforced.

fields.name: tech_level
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::TechLevel = 0x84. SetTechLevel (0x140288980): *(int*)(param_1 + 0x84) = clamped value. Lua_Get_Tech_Level at 0x140603040 reads *(int*)(player + 0x84). Auto-upgrade function at 0x140282190 increments this. Compared against objects' +0x89C tech requirement.

fields.name: max_tech_level
fields.evidence: KB + rvas.h PlayerObj::MaxTechLevel = 0x88. SetTechLevel: param_2 clamped to *(int*)(param_1 + 0x88). Auto-upgrade checks *(param_1 + 0x84) < *(param_1 + 0x88).

fields.name: dvec_int_array_0
fields.evidence: Destructor runs a loop destroying 10 inlined DynamicVectorClass<int> objects starting from offset_0xd0 region, iterating backwards in 24-byte strides. The first starts around 0x8C-0xD0 range.

fields.name: historically_built_types
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<struct_PlayerClass::HistoricallyBuiltObjectType> at offset_0xe0.

fields.name: buildable_types_1
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<class_GameObjectTypeClass_const*> at offset_0xf8.

fields.name: is_human_controlled
fields.evidence: Lua getter at 0x140603A40 reads *(byte*)(player + 0x108) as bool. Returns LuaValue<bool>. Maps to 'Is_Human' / 'IsHumanControlled' Lua binding.

fields.name: buildable_types_2
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<class_GameObjectTypeClass_const*> at offset_0x110.

fields.name: buildable_types_3
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<class_GameObjectTypeClass_const*> at offset_0x128.

fields.name: player_data_block_1
fields.evidence: Destructor calls cleanup function FUN_14027eb10 at field_0x140. Also calls FUN_140289530 at field_0x140.

fields.name: player_data_block_2
fields.evidence: Destructor calls cleanup function FUN_14027eb10 at field_0x180. Also calls FUN_140289530 at field_0x180.

fields.name: unlockable_types_dvec_header
fields.evidence: FUN_140047aa0 called with (param_1 + 0x1a8) for vector resize in add_to_unlocked_list (0x14027F860).

fields.name: unlocked_types_array
fields.evidence: Unlock_Tech (0x14027F860), Lock_Tech (0x140286150), IsUnlocked check (0x140282580) all read *(ptr*)(player + 0x1B0) as the data pointer of a DynamicVectorClass<GameObjectTypeClass*>. Contains the list of unlocked buildable types.

fields.name: unlocked_types_count
fields.evidence: IsUnlocked (0x140282580) reads *(int*)(player + 0x1B8) for iteration count. Unlock_Tech increments it. Lock_Tech decrements via vector remove.

fields.name: unlocked_types_capacity
fields.evidence: Unlock_Tech: capacity = *(int*)(param_1 + 0x1BC) * 2 >> 1 for growth check.

fields.name: locked_types_dvec
fields.evidence: Destructor calls FUN_14027ea70 at offset_0x1c0. Lock_Tech_Add (0x14027F7C0) uses offset 0x1C0 header, 0x1C8 data ptr, 0x1D0 count, 0x1D4 capacity. IsLocked (0x140282550) reads 0x1C8/0x1D0.

fields.name: locked_types_array
fields.evidence: IsLocked (0x140282550) reads *(ptr*)(player + 0x1C8). Unlock_Tech_Remove (0x140286100) reads same. Lock_Tech_Add writes to it.

fields.name: locked_types_count
fields.evidence: IsLocked reads *(int*)(player + 0x1D0) for loop bound. Lock_Tech_Add increments.

fields.name: locked_types_capacity
fields.evidence: Lock_Tech_Add: capacity = *(int*)(param_1 + 0x1D4) * 2 >> 1 for growth.

fields.name: type_list_4
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<GameObjectTypeClass const*> at offset_0x1e0.

fields.name: type_list_5
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<GameObjectTypeClass const*> at offset_0x1f8.

fields.name: type_list_6
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<GameObjectTypeClass const*> at offset_0x210.

fields.name: type_list_7
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<GameObjectTypeClass const*> at offset_0x228.

fields.name: type_list_8_vtable
fields.evidence: Destructor sets offset_0x250 = DynamicVectorClass vtable, then frees offset_0x258 data.

fields.name: type_list_8_data
fields.evidence: Destructor frees offset_0x258 (data ptr), resets offset_0x260 (count?) and offset_0x264 (capacity flags).

fields.name: type_list_9_vtable
fields.evidence: Destructor sets offset_0x268 = DynamicVectorClass vtable, then frees offset_0x270 data.

fields.name: type_list_9_data
fields.evidence: Destructor frees offset_0x270 and resets offset_0x278 (count), offset_0x27c (capacity).

fields.name: int_vector
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<int> at offset_0x280.

fields.name: type_list_10
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<GameObjectTypeClass const*> at offset_0x298.

fields.name: sub_object_ptr
fields.evidence: Destructor: calls virtual destructor on *(offset_0x2b0), then nulls it. A polymorphic sub-object.

fields.name: heap_buffer_1
fields.evidence: Destructor calls thunk_FUN_1407864b8 (operator delete) on offset_0x2c0.

fields.name: sub_struct_2c8
fields.evidence: Destructor calls FUN_1404c5b80 at field_0x2c8. Likely a specialized container.

fields.name: large_sub_object
fields.evidence: Destructor: if offset_0x2f0 != 0, calls FUN_140496830 then frees with size 0xB8. Contains MSVC SSO strings at sub+0x38, sub+0x58 (FileClass), sub+0xe0, sub+0x100. Likely a save/load or profile data structure.

fields.name: data_block_318
fields.evidence: Destructor calls FUN_14027ecc0 at offset_0x318.

fields.name: ai_player_ptr
fields.evidence: AddCredits: if *(ptr*)(player + 0x360) != 0, applies income multiplier from AI budget. SetTechLevel: propagates to AI via this pointer. Lua_Enable_As_Actor reads *(player + 0x360). Lua_Release_Credits_For_Tactical reads *(player + 0x360). Get_Name reads *(*(player + 0x360) + 0x58). Non-null for AI players, null for human players. Destructor calls FUN_140285dc0 at offset_0x360.

fields.name: diplomacy_table
fields.evidence: Is_Enemy (0x1402824F0): returns *(int*)(*(ptr*)(player + 0x370) + other_player_id * 4) == 1. Is_Ally (0x1402823E0): returns same[...] == 0. Make_Ally/Make_Enemy (0x140288800): writes *(int*)(*(ptr*)(player + 0x370) + target_id * 4) = 0 or 1. Array indexed by player_id, int32 per entry: 0=ally, 1=enemy.

fields.name: profile_data_ptr
fields.evidence: Destructor: if offset_0x378 != 0, destroys MSVC SSO strings at sub+0x100, sub+0xe0, destroys FileClass at sub+0x58, destroys SSO at sub+0x38, frees with size 0x120. Large data structure -- likely player profile or save metadata.

fields.name: black_market_items
fields.evidence: Destructor calls ~DynamicVectorClass<class_BlackMarketItemClass_const*> at offset_0x380.

fields.name: difficulty_level
fields.evidence: Lua getter at 0x140602AE0 reads *(int*)(player + 0x398) and returns as double. Context in LuaValue<double> property getter. Likely difficulty or a scoring metric.

fields.name: advisor_hints_base
fields.evidence: Lua_Enable_Advisor_Hints (0x140601E80): writes *(char*)(player + 0x3F8 + game_mode_index) = bool_value. Indexed by game mode ID (0=galactic, 1=land, 2=space). Array of per-mode advisor hint enable flags.

fields.name: black_market_tutorial_flag
fields.evidence: Lua_Set_Black_Market_Tutorial (0x140604300): *(char*)(player + 0x448) = bool. Directly written from Lua boolean parameter.

fields.name: sabotage_tutorial_flag
fields.evidence: Lua_Set_Sabotage_Tutorial (0x1406043C0): *(char*)(player + 0x449) = bool. Directly written from Lua boolean parameter.

fields.name: space_station_level
fields.evidence: Lua getter at 0x140602690 reads *(int*)(player + 0x484) and returns as double. Last property registered in PlayerWrapper constructor (called with 'Get_Space_Station'). Likely Get_Space_Station_Level return value.

dynamic_vector_classes_in_struct.summary: The destructor reveals at least 15 DynamicVectorClass instances inlined into PlayerClass, plus 10 DynamicVectorClass<int> instances in a loop. These store buildable types, locked/unlocked tech lists, historically built types, and black market items.

lua_wrapper_method_map.description: Mapping from PlayerWrapper constructor registration order to Lua method name and engine function. Each entry has the function pointer stored in the wrapper object, which dispatches to the PlayerClass method.

key_engine_functions.name: AddCredits
key_engine_functions.signature: float AddCredits(PlayerClass* player, float amount, char apply_to_ai)
key_engine_functions.notes: If amount > 0 and AI player attached (+0x360 != 0), multiplies by income rate from AI budget at *(ai+0x20). Credits clamped to [0, max_credits] unless max_credits < 0.

key_engine_functions.name: SetTechLevel
key_engine_functions.signature: int SetTechLevel(PlayerClass* player, int level, char propagate, char notify)
key_engine_functions.notes: Clamps to [0, max_tech_level]. Iterates game objects matching faction, checks obj+0x89C tech req vs new level, adds to unlocked list if obj+0xC1 and obj+0xC2 flags set.

key_engine_functions.name: SetDiplomacy
key_engine_functions.signature: void SetDiplomacy(PlayerClass* player, int target_player_id, int relation)
key_engine_functions.notes: Writes relation (0=ally, 1=enemy) into diplomacy_table[target_player_id]. Simple 1-line function.

key_engine_functions.name: IsUnlocked
key_engine_functions.notes: Linear scan of unlocked_types_array for matching pointer.

key_engine_functions.name: IsLocked
key_engine_functions.notes: Linear scan of locked_types_array for matching pointer.

key_engine_functions.name: AddToUnlockedList
key_engine_functions.notes: Checks for duplicates, grows vector if needed, appends type pointer.

key_engine_functions.name: AddToLockedList
key_engine_functions.notes: Same pattern as AddToUnlockedList but for locked types vector.

key_engine_functions.name: AutoUpgradeTechLevel
key_engine_functions.notes: If tech_level < max_tech_level, calls SetTechLevel(player, tech_level + 1, 1).

key_engine_functions.name: PlayerList_FindByID
key_engine_functions.notes: Bounds checks id against player_count, returns player_array[id].

key_engine_functions.name: GetLocalPlayerID
key_engine_functions.notes: Returns player_id (0x4C) of the player at list->local_player_index.

analysis_method: Ghidra MCP decompilation of PlayerClass destructor, 30 PlayerWrapper Lua methods, and 12 engine helper functions

field_offset_summary.description: Quick-reference of all unique offsets with confident names
